metadata.title: Original 7", B-Sides and 12" Versions - Remastered - Forever Young (Special Dance Version) [2019 Remaster]
metadata.lyrics:
[00:43.97] Let's dance in style, let's dance for a while
[00:46.26] Heaven can wait, we're only watching the skies
[00:50.82] Hoping for the best but expecting the worst
[00:52.91] Are you gonna drop the bomb or not?
[00:56.85] Let us die young, or let us live forever
[01:01.24] We don't have the power, but we never say never
[01:04.88] Sitting in a sandpit, life is a short trip
[01:08.45] The music's for the sad men
[01:10.89] Can you reimagine when this race is won?
[01:14.32] Turn our golden faces into the sun
[01:17.68] Praising our leaders, we're getting in tune
[01:21.83] The music's played by the madmen
[01:24.48] Forever young, I want to be forever young
[01:32.55] Do you really want to live forever
[01:36.13] Forever and ever
[01:38.47] Forever young
[01:41.67] I want to be forever young
[01:45.55] Do you really want to live forever?
[01:50.86] Forever young
[01:54.66] 
[02:48.66] Some are like water, some are like the heat
[02:52.25] Some are a melody and some are the beat
[02:56.76] Sooner or later, they all will be gone
[02:59.12] Why don't they stay young?
[03:03.49] It's so hard to get old without a cause
[03:06.13] I don't want to perish like a fading horse
[03:09.85] Youth's like diamonds in the sun
[03:13.14] And diamonds are forever
[03:16.58] So many adventures couldn't happen today
[03:20.23] So many songs we forgot to play
[03:23.62] So many dreams swinging out of the blue
[03:27.14] We let them come true, let them come true
[03:31.50] Forever young, I want to be forever young
[03:37.68] Do you really want to live forever
[03:40.87] Forever, and ever
[03:44.32] Forever young, I want to be forever young
[03:51.63] Do you really want to live forever
[03:54.82] Forever and ever
[03:58.51] Forever young, I wanna be forever young (forever young)
[04:06.39] Do you really want to live forever? (forever young)
[04:11.71] Forever young
[04:13.73]
